req.title: Reconciliation report (negative variant)
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.
preconditions: system job

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-075 mandates a daily reconciliation job at /cron/reconcile that: (1) stores a report, (2) opens incidents when internal ledger vs correspondent bank shows non-zero variance, and (3) assigns severity based on variance magnitude. Negative paths explicitly named are insufficient funds, unauthorised access, and exceeded limits. Test design uses EP to partition zero/non-zero variance; BVA to probe the variance=0 boundary (no incident) vs variance=1 (incident opens); NEG for each named error pathway; DT to map multiple condition combinations to outcomes; STC to verify the state machine transition from 'job triggered' -> 'report stored' -> 'incident opened'. Each test calls POST /cron/reconcile with a seeded ledger state and inspects the HTTP response plus downstream incident store.

tests.name: test_reconcile_zero_variance_no_incident
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Internal ledger and correspondent bank balances are seeded to identical values
No open incidents exist for today's reconciliation run
actions: Seed ledger balance = correspondent balance via <seed_balanced_ledger> fixture
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Fetch today's reconciliation report via GET /reports/reconciliation/today
expected: No incidents opened (incidents list is empty)
trace: R-FIN-075: report stored on EOD trigger
R-FIN-075: non-zero variance SHALL open incident (contrapositive: zero variance must NOT open incident)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def balanced_ledger():
    <seed_balanced_ledger>(BASE_URL, internal=10000_00, correspondent=10000_00)
    yield
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)

def test_reconcile_zero_variance_no_incident():
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile",
        json=<eod_trigger_payload>(),
        headers=<auth_header>()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert "report_id" in body

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/reports/reconciliation/today",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert report["status"] == "stored"
    assert report["variance"] == 0

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": "today"},
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert incidents["total"] == 0

tests.name: test_reconcile_nonzero_variance_opens_incident
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Internal ledger is seeded with a balance that differs from correspondent bank balance
No open incidents exist for today's reconciliation run
actions: Seed internal ledger = 10000.00, correspondent bank = 9500.00 (variance = 500.00) via <seed_mismatched_ledger>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
expected: Incident severity reflects the 500.00 variance magnitude
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-075: incident severity based on variance
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def mismatched_ledger():
    <seed_mismatched_ledger>(BASE_URL, internal=10000_00, correspondent=9500_00)
    yield
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)

def test_reconcile_nonzero_variance_opens_incident():
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile",
        json=<eod_trigger_payload>(),
        headers=<auth_header>()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/reports/reconciliation/today",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert report["status"] == "stored"
    assert report["variance"] == 500_00

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": "today"},
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert incidents["total"] == 1
    assert incidents["items"][0]["severity"] == <expected_severity>(500_00)

tests.name: test_reconcile_variance_exactly_zero_boundary
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Internal ledger and correspondent bank balances differ by exactly 0 (boundary point)
No open incidents exist for today's reconciliation run
actions: Seed internal ledger = 0.01, correspondent = 0.01 (minimum non-empty balance, zero variance) via <seed_balanced_ledger>
trace: R-FIN-075: boundary between zero-variance (no incident) and non-zero-variance (incident) partitions

tests.name: test_reconcile_variance_one_cent_above_boundary

    ).json()
    assert incidents["total"] == 1

tests.name: test_reconcile_insufficient_funds_negative_path
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Correspondent bank account is seeded with zero / insufficient balance
Internal ledger shows positive balance creating negative variance
actions: Seed internal=50000_00, correspondent=0 to represent insufficient funds state via <seed_insufficient_funds>
Assert HTTP 200 (job completes despite error condition)
Confirm report is stored with negative variance
Confirm incident opened with severity = HIGH or CRITICAL per <expected_severity>
expected: Incident severity is HIGH or CRITICAL
trace: R-FIN-075: incident severity based on variance magnitude
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def insufficient_funds_state():
    <seed_insufficient_funds>(BASE_URL, internal=50000_00, correspondent=0)
    yield
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)

def test_reconcile_insufficient_funds_negative_path():
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile",
        json=<eod_trigger_payload>(),
        headers=<auth_header>()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/reports/reconciliation/today",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert report["status"] == "stored"
    assert report["variance"] < 0

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": "today"},
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert incidents["total"] >= 1
    assert incidents["items"][0]["severity"] in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL")

tests.name: test_reconcile_unauthorised_trigger_rejected
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Caller has no authorisation token / uses an invalid token
actions: POST /cron/reconcile with missing or invalid Authorization header
Confirm no reconciliation report stored for today
trace: R-FIN-075: negative path - unauthorised caller must not execute reconciliation
R-FIN-075: precondition - system job with valid authority
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def clean_state():
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)
    yield
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)

def test_reconcile_unauthorised_trigger_rejected():
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile",
        json=<eod_trigger_payload>(),
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer invalid_token_xyz"}
    )
    assert resp.status_code in (401, 403)

    report_resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/reports/reconciliation/today",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    )
    assert report_resp.status_code == 404 or report_resp.json().get("total", 0) == 0

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": "today"},
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert incidents["total"] == 0

tests.name: test_reconcile_exceeded_limit_variance_severity
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Variance is seeded to exceed the configured limit threshold (e.g. > 1000000.00)
No open incidents exist for today
actions: Seed internal=2000000_00, correspondent=0 to force variance above limit via <seed_exceeded_limit>
Fetch report and assert variance > limit_threshold
Fetch incident and assert severity == CRITICAL
expected: Report stored with variance exceeding limit
trace: R-FIN-075: incident severity based on variance (DT: exceeded-limit row -> CRITICAL severity)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
LIMIT_THRESHOLD = 1000000_00

@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def exceeded_limit_state():
    <seed_exceeded_limit>(BASE_URL, internal=2000000_00, correspondent=0)
    yield
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)

def test_reconcile_exceeded_limit_variance_severity():
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile",
        json=<eod_trigger_payload>(),
        headers=<auth_header>()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/reports/reconciliation/today",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert report["status"] == "stored"
    assert abs(report["variance"]) > LIMIT_THRESHOLD

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": "today"},
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert incidents["total"] >= 1
    assert incidents["items"][0]["severity"] == "CRITICAL"

tests.name: test_reconcile_state_transition_triggered_to_stored_to_incident
preconditions: Banking API is reachable
Reconciliation job is in IDLE state (not yet triggered today)
Ledger variance is non-zero to force full state path
actions: Verify job status is IDLE via GET /cron/reconcile/status
Assert HTTP 200 and job status transitions to COMPLETED
Assert report state == stored and incident state == OPEN
trace: R-FIN-075: STC covering full lifecycle: EOD trigger fires job, job stores report, incident opened
R-FIN-075: triggers=EOD trigger; expected outcomes=report stored; incidents opened on variance
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def state_transition_setup():
    <reset_job_state>(BASE_URL, job="reconcile")
    <seed_mismatched_ledger>(BASE_URL, internal=30000_00, correspondent=29000_00)
    yield
    <cleanup_reconciliation_data>(BASE_URL)

def test_reconcile_state_transition_triggered_to_stored_to_incident():
    pre = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile/status",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert pre["state"] == "IDLE"

    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile",
        json=<eod_trigger_payload>(),
        headers=<auth_header>()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    post = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile/status",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert post["state"] == "COMPLETED"

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/reports/reconciliation/today",
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert report["status"] == "stored"

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": "today"},
        headers=<auth_header>()
    ).json()
    assert incidents["items"][0]["state"] == "OPEN"
